targets.rawSql: SELECT DATEDIFF(MINUTE,sqlserver_start_time,GETUTCDATE()) FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info;

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time 
  ,$Aggregate(SQLProcessUtilization+OtherProcessUtilization) AS [CPU%]
FROM Archive.ProcessUtilization
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd)
  ,$Aggregate(SQLProcessUtilization+OtherProcessUtilization) AS [CPU%_PreviousMonth]
FROM Archive.ProcessUtilization
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
WHERE $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
GROUP BY T.DataAdd
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description:
Task > 10 = Blocking/Deadlocking  
Runnable > 1 = CPU Pressure  
PendingDiskIO > 1 = Disk Pressure

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time 
	,$Aggregate([AverageTaskCount]) AS AverageTaskCount
	,$Aggregate([AverageRunnableTaskCount]) AS AverageRunnableTaskCount
	,$Aggregate([AveragePendingDiskIOCount]) AS AveragePendingDiskIOCount
FROM Archive.Schedulers
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: $Datasource $Aggregate for $IntervalValue $Interval Schedulers

panels.description:
Task > 10 = Blocking/Deadlocking  
Runnable > 1 = CPU Pressure  
PendingDiskIO > 1 = Disk Pressure

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time 
	,$Aggregate([AverageTaskCount]) AS AverageTaskCount
FROM Archive.Schedulers
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd)
	,$Aggregate([AverageTaskCount]) AS AverageTaskCount_PreviousMonth
FROM Archive.Schedulers
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
WHERE $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
GROUP BY T.DataAdd
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: $Datasource $Aggregate for $IntervalValue $Interval Schedulers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
CounterName,
$Aggregate(CounterValue) AS Value
FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
AND CounterName IN ('Total Server Memory (KB)','Lock Memory (KB)','Connection Memory (KB)','Database Cache Memory (KB)')
GROUP BY DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue, CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH LazyWrites AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Lazy writes/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.CounterValue - aPrior.CounterValue)/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM LazyWrites a
INNER JOIN LazyWrites aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
)A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT  DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
        CounterName,
		$Aggregate(CounterValue) AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Memory Grants Pending')
	GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
	ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH FreeListStalls AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Free list stalls/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.CounterValue - aPrior.CounterValue)/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM FreeListStalls a
INNER JOIN FreeListStalls aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]
)A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Calculated PLE per 4GB, threshold fixed at 300 seconds

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
$Aggregate(PageLifeExpectancyDynamic) AS Value
FROM Archive.V_PageLifeExpectancy
WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd),
$Aggregate(PageLifeExpectancyDynamic) AS PreviousMonth
FROM Archive.V_PageLifeExpectancy
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
WHERE $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
GROUP BY T.DataAdd
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: $Datasource $Aggregate for $IntervalValue $Interval Page Life Expectancy

targets.rawSql:
;WITH DriveIOLatency AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(io_stall_read_ms) AS io_stall_read_ms,
        SUM(io_stall_write_ms) AS io_stall_write_ms,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadLatency) AS ReadLatency,
	   $Aggregate(WriteLatency) AS WriteLatency
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.Drive,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0 END AS ReadLatency,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_write_ms-aPrior.io_stall_write_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0 END AS WriteLatency
FROM DriveIOLatency a
INNER JOIN DriveIOLatency aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes
AND (a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) >= 0
AND (a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms) >= 0
) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOLatency AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(io_stall_read_ms) AS io_stall_read_ms,
        SUM(io_stall_write_ms) AS io_stall_write_ms,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadLatency) AS ReadLatency,
	   $Aggregate(WriteLatency) AS WriteLatency
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.Drive,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0 END AS ReadLatency,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_write_ms-aPrior.io_stall_write_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0 END AS WriteLatency
FROM DriveIOLatency a
INNER JOIN DriveIOLatency aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes
AND (a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) >= 0
AND (a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms) >= 0
) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOLatency AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(io_stall_read_ms) AS io_stall_read_ms,
        SUM(io_stall_write_ms) AS io_stall_write_ms,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)

SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd),
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadLatency) AS ReadLatency_PreviousMonth,
	   $Aggregate(WriteLatency) AS WriteLatency_PreviousMonth
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.Drive,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0 END AS ReadLatency,
       CASE WHEN(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes) <= 0 THEN 0
       ELSE(a.io_stall_write_ms-aPrior.io_stall_write_ms)*1.0/(a.num_of_writes-aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0 END AS WriteLatency
FROM DriveIOLatency a
INNER JOIN DriveIOLatency aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes
AND (a.num_of_reads-aPrior.num_of_reads) >= 0
AND (a.io_stall_read_ms-aPrior.io_stall_read_ms) >= 0
) A
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
WHERE $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
GROUP BY T.DataAdd, Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOIOPS AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadIOPS) AS ReadIOPS,
	   $Aggregate(WriteIOPS) AS WriteIOPS
FROM (
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_reads - aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadIOPS,
        (a.num_of_writes - aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteIOPS
FROM DriveIOIOPS a
INNER JOIN DriveIOIOPS aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOIOPS AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_reads) AS num_of_reads,
		SUM(num_of_writes) AS num_of_writes
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd),
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadIOPS) AS ReadIOPS_PreviousMonth,
	   $Aggregate(WriteIOPS) AS WriteIOPS_PreviousMonth
FROM (
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_reads - aPrior.num_of_reads)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadIOPS,
        (a.num_of_writes - aPrior.num_of_writes)*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteIOPS
FROM DriveIOIOPS a
INNER JOIN DriveIOIOPS aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_reads >= aPrior.num_of_reads
AND a.num_of_writes >= aPrior.num_of_writes) A
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
GROUP BY T.DataAdd, Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOThroughput AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_bytes_read) AS num_of_bytes_read,
		SUM(num_of_bytes_written) AS num_of_bytes_written
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadThroughputMBPS) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
	   $Aggregate(WriteThroughputMBPS) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM (
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_bytes_read - aPrior.num_of_bytes_read)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
        (a.num_of_bytes_written - aPrior.num_of_bytes_written)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM DriveIOThroughput a
INNER JOIN DriveIOThroughput aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_bytes_read >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_read
AND a.num_of_bytes_written >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_written) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOThroughput AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_bytes_read) AS num_of_bytes_read,
		SUM(num_of_bytes_written) AS num_of_bytes_written
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadThroughputMBPS) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
	   $Aggregate(WriteThroughputMBPS) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM (
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_bytes_read - aPrior.num_of_bytes_read)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
        (a.num_of_bytes_written - aPrior.num_of_bytes_written)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM DriveIOThroughput a
INNER JOIN DriveIOThroughput aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_bytes_read >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_read
AND a.num_of_bytes_written >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_written) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH DriveIOThroughput AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		    CheckDateTime,
        LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) AS Drive,
        SUM(num_of_bytes_read) AS num_of_bytes_read,
		SUM(num_of_bytes_written) AS num_of_bytes_written
    FROM [Archive].[FileStatistics]
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
    AND LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1) = 'G'
    GROUP BY CheckDateTime, LEFT(UPPER(PhysicalName), 1)
)
SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd),
	   Drive,
	   $Aggregate(ReadThroughputMBPS) AS ReadThroughputMBPS_PreviousMonth,
	   $Aggregate(WriteThroughputMBPS) AS WriteThroughputMBPS_PreviousMonth
FROM (
SELECT  a.CheckDateTime,
	      a.Drive,
        (a.num_of_bytes_read - aPrior.num_of_bytes_read)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS ReadThroughputMBPS,
        (a.num_of_bytes_written - aPrior.num_of_bytes_written)/1024/1024*1.0/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS WriteThroughputMBPS
FROM DriveIOThroughput a
INNER JOIN DriveIOThroughput aPrior
ON a.Drive = aPrior.Drive
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.num_of_bytes_read >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_read
AND a.num_of_bytes_written >= aPrior.num_of_bytes_written) A
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
GROUP BY T.DataAdd, Drive
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DatabaseName,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT [StartTime],
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,StartTime,EndTime) Value
  FROM msdb.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('BACKUP_DATABASE')
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime))A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DatabaseName,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT [StartTime],
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,StartTime,EndTime) Value
  FROM msdb.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('DBCC_CHECKDB')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime)) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DatabaseName,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT StartTime,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,(StartTime),(EndTime)) Value
  FROM msdb.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('UPDATE_STATISTICS')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime))A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'),DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DatabaseName,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT StartTime,
DatabaseName,
DATEDIFF(SECOND,StartTime,EndTime) Value
  FROM msdb.[dbo].[CommandLog]
  WHERE 1=1
AND CommandType IN ('ALTER_INDEX')
--AND Command LIKE '%DIFF%'
AND $__timeFilter(StartTime))A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',StartTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'),DatabaseName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT sJOB.name AS JobName
		, msdb.dbo.agent_datetime(run_date, run_time) AS RunStartTime
		, ( run_duration / 10000 * 60 * 60 ) + ( run_duration / 100 % 100 * 60 ) + ( run_duration % 100 ) AS RunDuration --seconds
			, sJOBH.run_status AS RunStatus
			--, CASE WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 0 THEN 'Failed'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 1 THEN 'Succeeded'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 2 THEN 'Retry'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 3 THEN 'Canceled'
			--	   WHEN sJOBH.run_status = 4 THEN 'In Progress'
			--END AS RunStatus
	   FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobs AS sJOB
	   LEFT JOIN
	   (
		   SELECT job_id
				, step_name
				, run_date
				, run_time
				, run_status
				, run_duration
				, message
				, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY job_id
											   , step_id
				  ORDER BY run_date DESC
						 , run_time DESC) AS RowNumber
		   FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobhistory
		   WHERE step_id <> 0
	   ) AS sJOBH ON sJOB.job_id = sJOBH.job_id AND 
					 sJOBH.RowNumber = 1
	
	   WHERE sJOB.enabled = 1 AND 
	   ( sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_SystemDatabaseBackup%'
	   OR sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_UserDatabaseBackup%'
	   OR sJOB.name LIKE 'DBA_UpdateStatistics'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_SystemDatabaseIntegrityCheck'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_UserDatabaseIntegrityCheck'
	   OR sJOB.Name LIKE 'DBA_IndexMaintenance'
	   )
			 OPTION(RECOMPILE);

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   WaitType,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	   a.WaitType,
	   --(a.WaitCount - aPrior.WaitCount) AS WaitCountDelta,
       (a.[Wait_Seconds] - aPrior.[Wait_Seconds]) AS Value
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), WaitType
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   WaitType,
	   $Aggregate(Value) AS Value
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	   a.WaitType,
    (a.[Wait_Seconds] - aPrior.[Wait_Seconds]) / NULLIF((a.[WaitCount] - aPrior.[WaitCount]),0) AS Value
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), WaitType
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds,
		Signal_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   $Aggregate([%signal (cpu) waits]) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
	   $Aggregate([%resource waits]) AS [%resource waits]
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	   CAST(100.0 * SUM(a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
     CAST(100.0 * SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds) - (a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds)) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%resource waits]
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
GROUP BY a.CheckDateTime) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH WaitStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
    WaitType,
		WaitCount,
		Wait_Seconds,
		Signal_Seconds
    FROM [Archive].WaitStatistics
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   WaitType,
	   $Aggregate([%signal (cpu) waits]) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
	   $Aggregate([%resource waits]) AS [%resource waits]
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	   a.WaitType,
	   CAST(100.0 * SUM(a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%signal (cpu) waits],
     CAST(100.0 * SUM((a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds) - (a.Signal_Seconds-aPrior.Signal_Seconds)) / NULLIF(SUM(a.Wait_Seconds-aPrior.Wait_Seconds),0) AS NUMERIC(20, 2)) AS [%resource waits]
FROM WaitStatistics a
INNER JOIN WaitStatistics aPrior
ON a.WaitType = aPrior.WaitType
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.WaitCount >= aPrior.WaitCount
GROUP BY a.CheckDateTime,a.WaitType) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), WaitType
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Batch Requests/sec',
                         'SQL Compilations/sec',
                         'SQL Re-Compilations/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])
	   /
	   CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) END AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Batch Requests/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])
	   /
	   CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) END AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
	CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
	AND CounterName IN ('Batch Requests/sec')
)
SELECT $__time(T.DataAdd),
	   CounterName+'_PreviousMonth',
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])
	   /
	   CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) END AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]) A
CROSS APPLY (SELECT DATEADD(MONTH,1,DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')) AS DataAdd) T
WHERE $__timeFilter(T.DataAdd)
GROUP BY T.DataAdd, CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Page Splits/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue]) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
		CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Forwarded Records/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate(CounterValue) AS CounterValue
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue])/DATEDIFF(ss, aPrior.CheckDateTime, a.CheckDateTime) AS CounterValue
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue])A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DriveLetter,
	   $Aggregate([Free%]) AS [Free%]
FROM (
SELECT CheckDateTime, 
       DriveLetter,
       (TotalSizeMB - (TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB))*1.0/TotalSizeMB * 100.0 AS [Free%]
FROM Archive.DriveSize
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
AND (TotalSizeMB - (TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB))*1.0/TotalSizeMB * 100.0 < 20) A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), DriveLetter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   DriveLetter,
	   $Aggregate(UsedSizeMB) AS UsedSize
FROM (
SELECT CheckDateTime, 
       DriveLetter,
       TotalSizeMB - FreeSizeMB AS UsedSizeMB
FROM Archive.DriveSize
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime))A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), DriveLetter
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval, DATEDIFF($Interval, 0, CheckDateTime),0) AS time, 
  CASE WHEN LEFT(DatabaseName,3) = 'KPD' THEN 'KPDB%'
       WHEN LEFT(DatabaseName,3) = 'SCG' THEN 'SCG%'
       WHEN LEFT(DatabaseName,3) = 'Par' THEN 'Partner%'
  ELSE MAX(DatabaseName)
  END AS DatabaseType, 
  SUM([UsedSizePage]* 8) AS Value
FROM [Archive].[DatabaseSize]
  WHERE $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
  AND DatabaseName NOT IN ('AdminSQL','DBManagement','master','msdb','model','tempdb')
  GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval, DATEDIFF($Interval, 0, CheckDateTime),0), LEFT(DatabaseName,3)
  ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       SUM(DurationMS/1000) AS Duration,
       SUM(TotalBlockCount) AS TotalBlockCount
FROM Archive.BlockedProcessReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate([Value]) AS [Value]
FROM (
SELECT  CheckDateTime,
        CounterName,
		CounterValue AS Value
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	AND CounterName IN ('Processes blocked'))A
	GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
	ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT EventTimeStamp,
       TotalBlockCount,
       BlockedProcess,
       BlockingProcess,
       BlockedClientApp,
       BlockedHostName,
       BlockedLoginName,
       BlockedIsolationLevel,
       BlockingClientApp,
       BlockingHostName,
       BlockingLoginName,
       BlockingIsolationLevel
FROM Archive.BlockedProcessReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)

;WITH SQLStatistics AS
(
    SELECT DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY CheckDateTime ASC
            ) AS ID,
    CheckDateTime,
    CounterName AS CounterName,
		CounterValue AS CounterValue
    FROM [Archive].PerformanceCounter
    WHERE 1=1
    AND $__timeFilter(CheckDateTime)
	  AND CounterName IN ('Number of Deadlocks/sec',
							'Lock Timeouts (timeout > 0)/sec')
)
SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time,
	   CounterName,
	   $Aggregate([Value]) AS [Value]
FROM (
SELECT a.CheckDateTime,
	     a.CounterName,
       (a.[CounterValue] - aPrior.[CounterValue]) AS Value
FROM SQLStatistics a
INNER JOIN SQLStatistics aPrior
ON a.CounterName = aPrior.CounterName
AND a.ID - 1 = aPrior.ID
WHERE a.[CounterValue] >= aPrior.[CounterValue])A
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',CheckDateTime)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CounterName
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       COUNT(*) AS DeadlockCount
FROM Archive.XMLDeadlockReport
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01')
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       LockedObject,
       COUNT(*) AS DeadlockCount
FROM Archive.XMLDeadlockReportShredded
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
AND LockedObject IS NOT NULL
AND Victim = 1
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'),LockedObject
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01') AS time, 
       CAST(ErrorNumber AS VARCHAR(5)) AS Error,
       CAST(Severity AS VARCHAR(2)) AS Severity,
       CAST(ErrorMessage AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ErrorMessage,
       COUNT(*) AS Value
FROM Archive.ErrorReported E
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
GROUP BY DATEADD($Interval,DATEDIFF($Interval,'2000-01-01',EventTimeStamp)/$IntervalValue*$IntervalValue,'2000-01-01'), CAST(ErrorNumber AS VARCHAR(5)), CAST(Severity AS VARCHAR(2)),CAST(ErrorMessage AS VARCHAR(50))
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT EventTimeStamp, 
       ErrorNumber,
       Severity,
       ErrorMessage,
       [SQLText],
       [ClientAppName], 
       [ClientHostName], 
       [DatabaseName], 
       [ServerPrincipalName]
FROM Archive.ErrorReported E
WHERE 1=1
AND $__timeFilter(EventTimeStamp)
